summary: Implemented TASK-060: Cross-platform CLI testing. Added CI workflow (ci-cross-platform.yml) with matrix strategy for Windows/macOS/Linux x Node 18/20/22. Created 35 cross-platform tests covering path handling, temp directories, scaffolding, workflow execution, validation, and line endings. Fixed two cross-platform bugs: resolveConfigPath using '/' instead of path.join (broke on Windows), and executeWorkflow not quoting file paths with spaces on Windows shell mode. All 171 tests pass.
